insights.tactical_flaw: Gets bogged down by left-arm orthodox spin sliding across him early in the innings.
insights.optimal_tactic: Deploy a left-arm spinner immediately in the powerplay. Keep the line tight on middle-and-leg to restrict room.

insights.tactical_flaw: Vulnerable to high-pace yorkers swinging back into the pads early on.
insights.optimal_tactic: Use Mohammed Siraj to bowl full, searching for swing into the left-hander's pads.

fielding.reason: To cut off the flick shot and build dot-ball pressure in the powerplay.
Stationed for the inside edge or leg glance when digging out the inswinging yorker.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Dropped a thick outside edge in the 2nd over. Head went on to score a rapid 60 in the powerplay.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles against mystery spin turning back into him in the middle overs.
insights.optimal_tactic: Bowl Sunil Narine with a tight leg-side field, forcing him to sweep.

insights.tactical_flaw: Often slashes hard at wide yorkers away from his body.
insights.optimal_tactic: Deploy Jasprit Bumrah. Bowl 5th stump line wide yorkers consistently.

fielding.reason: Forces him to play square rather than fine, cutting off the paddle sweep.
Prime catching spot for his aggressive but risky aerial off-side slashes.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Let a routine drive slip for a boundary, releasing built-up pressure in a tight chase.

insights.tactical_flaw: Tends to fetch wide off-spin deliveries, leading to sliced catches.
insights.optimal_tactic: Use Moeen Ali or Ravindra Jadeja wide of the off-stump, floating it outside his arc.

insights.tactical_flaw: Tentative against sharp inswing in the first two overs.
insights.optimal_tactic: Trent Boult to bowl back-to-back inswingers aiming for the front pad.

fielding.reason: Perfect placement for the sliced cut shot.
For any inside edges that pop up off the pads.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Spilled a top edge. Dube capitalized and hit 3 sixes in the next two overs.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles to generate power on slow, back-of-length cutters outside off.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mohit Sharma to heavily use slower bouncers wide of the crease.

insights.tactical_flaw: Can be drawn into a false drive by late away swing.
insights.optimal_tactic: Arshdeep Singh to angle it across and look for the outside edge.

fielding.reason: To guard the boundary when he tries to slap the slow ball over the off side.
Crucial for catching the nick from the driving length.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Cost PBKS the match as Miller finished the game in the next over.

insights.tactical_flaw: Over-cautious against wrist spin in the middle overs, leading to dot ball pressure.
insights.optimal_tactic: Bowl Kuldeep Yadav through overs 7-11. Keep the pace varied and use the wrong'un outside off.

insights.tactical_flaw: Loses balance when reaching for wide yorkers from over the wicket.
insights.optimal_tactic: Pace bowlers must strictly target the wide guideline. Do not bowl at the stumps.

fielding.reason: To catch the edge when he attempts a defensive prod against the googly.
Protects the boundary when he throws his bat at the wide yorker.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Missed a sitter at the boundary, resulting in a six and huge momentum shift.

insights.tactical_flaw: Vulnerable to high pace directed straight at his armpit.
insights.optimal_tactic: Pat Cummins must bowl short and at the body immediately.

insights.tactical_flaw: Destroys spin but can be bogged down by wide, slow bouncers.
insights.optimal_tactic: Keep spinners away from him. Use Andre Russell to bowl slow and wide outside off.

fielding.reason: Ready for the awkward fend off the ribs.
For the sliced shot when reaching for the wide slower ball.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Let a ball go through his legs for four, ruining the pressure built in the powerplay.

insights.tactical_flaw: Freezes against sharp, fast bouncers directed at his helmet.
insights.optimal_tactic: Kagiso Rabada needs to bowl aggressive short pitch bowling around the wicket.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles to get underneath low, dipping full tosses and yorkers.
insights.optimal_tactic: Matheesha Pathirana should strictly target his toes at the death.

fielding.reason: Waiting for the uncontrolled hook shot.
To cut off the straight drive if he manages to dig it out.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Dropped a skier in the 20th over, costing an extra 12 runs.

insights.tactical_flaw: Hits through the line wildly. Prone to playing early against cutters.
insights.optimal_tactic: Jasprit Bumrah to mix raw pace with the off-cutter to deceive his swing.

insights.tactical_flaw: Exploits angles behind square but can be tied down by wide, full lines outside off.
insights.optimal_tactic: Pack the off-side field and bowl consistent 5th stump wide yorkers.

fielding.reason: Pushed deep to catch the mistimed lofted drive off the cutter.
Essential for catching the slice when he is denied his leg-side pickup shots.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Failed to collect a wide turning ball, allowing Pant a massive lifeline.

insights.tactical_flaw: Takes time to accelerate. Struggles to hit orthodox spin out of the ground early.
insights.optimal_tactic: R. Ashwin to bowl early in his innings to choke his strike rate.

insights.tactical_flaw: Attempts high-intent shots on every ball early in his innings, increasing risk.
insights.optimal_tactic: Bowl test-match lengths in the channel outside off. Let his impatience cause a mistake.

fielding.reason: To catch him if he prematurely tries to break the shackles.
To catch the slashed drive on the up.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: A tough diving chance missed, allowing Buttler to build a solid opening stand.

insights.tactical_flaw: Goes hard at everything. Can edge deliveries that angle across him at high pace.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mayank Yadav to bowl 150km/h+ angling across the left-hander.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles to generate power on short, slow bouncers angled across his body.
insights.optimal_tactic: Use off-cutters dug short into the pitch. Force him to drag the ball from outside off.

fielding.reason: High probability of flying outside edges.
To catch the mistimed pull shot off the slow bouncer.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Dived over a cut shot, giving away 4 runs and releasing pressure.

insights.tactical_flaw: Can be bowled through the gate by sharp turning leg-spin early in the innings.
insights.optimal_tactic: Deploy a spinner early to target the gap between bat and pad.

insights.tactical_flaw: Prefers pace on the ball. Struggles to hit slow off-cutters straight down the ground.
insights.optimal_tactic: Use variations in pace; bowl slow, dipping cutters away from his hitting arc.

fielding.reason: To stop the worked singles and build pressure.
Placed exactly where he tends to miscue the slower deliveries.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Dropped a sharp catch that allowed Gaikwad to anchor the innings.

insights.tactical_flaw: Dominates pace in the powerplay but struggles with tight off-spin.
insights.optimal_tactic: Introduce a finger spinner in the first 3 overs to restrict boundary options on the leg side.

insights.tactical_flaw: Vulnerable to incoming deliveries that target the stumps early on.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mitchell Starc to swing the ball into the pads aiming for LBW or bowled.

fielding.reason: To cut off the sweeps and paddles he uses to counter spin.
To catch the flick shot if the inswinger is slightly misdirected.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Failed to hold onto a thick edge, extending the PBKS innings by 20 runs.

insights.tactical_flaw: Can be tentative early against sharp inswing from around the wicket.
insights.optimal_tactic: Use Jasprit Bumrah with a brand new ball targeting the front pad.

insights.tactical_flaw: Tends to muscle the ball over mid-wicket but struggles with back-of-length deliveries cramping his room.
insights.optimal_tactic: Bowl into the pitch, targeting the lower chest. Do not give him length to extend his arms.

fielding.reason: In position for the inside edge onto the pads.
To stop the cramped pull shot and build pressure.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Parag was dropped on 15 and went on to score a match-winning 65.

insights.tactical_flaw: Extremely strong down the ground but struggles to generate power on wide yorkers.
insights.optimal_tactic: Commit fully to the wide yorker line at the death. Do not bowl at his stumps.

insights.tactical_flaw: Lethal against spin but can be bogged down by wide pace off the ball.
insights.optimal_tactic: Use Khaleel Ahmed to bowl wide, dipping slower balls.

fielding.reason: To cover the slice when he reaches for the wide deliveries.
To defend against the slap shot over the off-side.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Lost the ball in the lights, parrying it over the rope for six.

insights.tactical_flaw: Notorious weakness against the short ball aimed at the right shoulder.
insights.optimal_tactic: Employ Mayank Yadav to bowl persistent short-pitch bowling at extreme pace.

insights.tactical_flaw: Plants his front foot early. Vulnerable to fast, full deliveries swinging into the pads.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mitchell Starc to bowl full and fast aiming for the base of middle stump.

fielding.reason: Stationed specifically for the uncontrolled hook shot.
Brought inside the ring to restrict his straight drives.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Fumbled a routine pickup, allowing a second run that shifted the momentum.

insights.tactical_flaw: Can be overly aggressive against spin, leading to mistimed slog sweeps.
insights.optimal_tactic: Toss the ball up wide outside off-stump with a spinner to invite the slog against the turn.

insights.tactical_flaw: Stationary against spin early in the innings; hits exclusively from the crease.
insights.optimal_tactic: Bowl extremely slow pace, 4th/5th stump line to force him to generate all the power.

fielding.reason: Prime catching location for the mistimed slog sweep.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Dropped an easy top edge, allowing Buttler to bat through the innings.

insights.tactical_flaw: Excellent at sweeping pace, but struggles with high-pace bouncers aimed at the badge.

insights.tactical_flaw: Can be tied down by mystery spin turning back into him.

insights.tactical_flaw: Strong off the pads but struggles to drive cleanly through the off-side against spin.

insights.tactical_flaw: Takes time to accelerate. Struggles to hit orthodox off-spin out of the ground early.

insights.tactical_flaw: Vulnerable to high pace at the armpit.

insights.optimal_tactic: Mitchell Starc to strictly target the wide guideline.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Allowed a crucial boundary.

insights.tactical_flaw: Highly aggressive but impatient against high-quality wrist spin.
insights.optimal_tactic: Bring on Rashid Khan immediately. Toss it up wide outside off and invite the big slog sweep.

insights.tactical_flaw: Lethal against spin but can be bogged down by wide pace off the ball.

fielding.reason: Prime catching location for a mistimed slog sweep.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Gill scored a pivotal 60 in a high-pressure match.

insights.tactical_flaw: Attempts ultra-aggressive, high-intent shots on every ball early in the innings, increasing risk.
insights.optimal_tactic: Bowl test-match lengths in the channel outside off. Let his impatience cause a mistake.

insights.tactical_flaw: Steps out to spinners regardless of the line, leaving himself vulnerable to stumpings.
insights.optimal_tactic: Use Yuzvendra Chahal to bowl wide and slow, dragging him out of the crease.

fielding.reason: To catch the slashed drive on the up.
Pushed back as bait to encourage him to step out and loft.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Parried it for a six, ending RR's campaign.

insights.tactical_flaw: Can be tentative early in the innings against sharp inswing.
insights.optimal_tactic: Use Mohammed Shami with a brand new ball targeting the front pad. Look for early LBW.

insights.tactical_flaw: Pre-meditates the sweep against spin.
insights.optimal_tactic: Bowl quick and flat on the stumps. Do not give the ball air.

fielding.reason: In position for the inside edge onto the pads.
To limit the damage if he connects with the sweep.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: A rare drop from Rashid in a crucial knockout match.

insights.tactical_flaw: In high-pressure run chases, he looks to anchor. Can be squeezed by boundary riders cutting off his singles.
insights.optimal_tactic: Bring the field up in the ring, deny the easy single, and force him to take aerial risks against spin.

insights.tactical_flaw: Prefers pace on the ball to time his shots. Can struggle to force the pace against cutters on a sticky wicket.
insights.optimal_tactic: Deploy Siraj with cross-seam cutters into the pitch. Remove all pace from the delivery.

fielding.reason: To aggressively cut off the strike rotation and build scoreboard pressure.
To catch the mistimed lofted drive when he tries to force the pace.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Dropped the trophy. Sudharsan went on to score a match-winning 96.
